name: BeBe & CeCe Winans
description: '''BeBe & CeCe Winans''' are an American [[gospel music|gospel]]/[[R&B music]] brother and sister duo. [[BeBe Winans|BeBe]] and [[CeCe Winans]] are the seventh and eighth of the [[Winans family]]'s ten children, most of whom have had gospel music careers. Together, they have received several awards, including three [[Grammys]].
